LanguageData.bravesoul.label: <color=#00CED1>immortal soul</color>
LanguageData.bravesoul.description:
The immortal soul doctrine runs five channels in parallel: cognitive fervor, physical might, vital ascendance, combat mastery, and indomitable spirit. Its linked design is front-line focused, giving a stable baseline that synergy states can escalate into stronger sustained pressure and suppression.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.bravesoul_cognitive.label: cognitive fervor
LanguageData.bravesoul_cognitive.description:
Sharpened mind and heightened perception fueled by warrior spirit.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.bravesoul_physical.label: physical might
LanguageData.bravesoul_physical.description:
Unmatched agility and control honed through countless battles.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.bravesoul_vitals.label: vital ascendance
LanguageData.bravesoul_vitals.description:
Reinforced organs and accelerated recovery.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.bravesoul_vitals.stages.0.label: vital ascendance (stable)
LanguageData.bravesoul_vitals.stages.1.label: vital ascendance (awakened)
LanguageData.bravesoul_vitals.stages.2.label: vital ascendance (surging)
LanguageData.bravesoul_vitals.stages.3.label: vital ascendance (frenzy)
LanguageData.bravesoul_vitals.stages.4.label: vital ascendance (undying)
LanguageData.bravesoul_combat.label: combat mastery
LanguageData.bravesoul_combat.description:
Supreme martial prowess and adaptive defenses.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.bravesoul_spirit.label: indomitable spirit
LanguageData.bravesoul_spirit.description:
A resolve that even death cannot shake.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.EM_BraveSpine_BattleTrance.label: combat rhythm
LanguageData.EM_BraveSpine_BattleTrance.description:
This warspine locks the host into a ritualized combat rhythm, suppressing hesitation and driving cleaner, more decisive attack sequencing.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.EM_BraveSpine.label: indomitable warspine
LanguageData.EM_BraveSpine.description:
This spine keeps physical might and indomitable spirit online as a stable front-line baseline. Linked effects trigger by pressure: combat mastery in live combat, vital ascendance below 65% health, and combat rhythm while drafted.
-- easyrim
